description: The Eclipse project 'DataProcessor' has compilation errors because its library dependencies are not on the build path. The project's lib/ folder contains three JAR files (commons-lang3-3.14.0.jar, gson-2.10.1.jar, slf4j-api-2.0.9.jar) that need to be added to the Java Build Path. Configure the project to include these dependencies and ensure src/main/java is correctly set as a source folder. Resolve all compilation errors in App.java, JsonTransformer.java, and TextAnalyzer.java until the project builds successfully.
